# Upstream grammar licenses

The `.wasm` artifacts in this directory are compiled from upstream tree-sitter
grammars released under the MIT License. MIT requires the copyright notice and
permission notice to accompany redistributed works; that attribution is
reproduced here per-grammar.

OpenCodeHub itself is licensed under Apache-2.0 (see repo root `LICENSE`). The
vendored `.wasm` artifacts remain under their upstream MIT terms.

---
